headline_en: Agentic AI’s center of gravity moved from raw capability to containment, compute supply, and the workflows needed to make agents useful in real products.
headline_zh: Agentic AI 的重心正从单纯能力转向隔离控制、compute 供给，以及让 agents 真正在产品中发挥作用的工作流。

items.en: Box CEO Aaron Levie argued that open, highly capable cybersecurity models are inevitable, including outside the U.S., so gatekeeping frontier AI may weaken U.S. strategy without materially improving safety. His view: if advanced models will become available anyway, the better move is to stay at the frontier and shape future AI architectures instead of assuming China cannot catch up.
items.zh: Box CEO Aaron Levie 认为，高能力的开源 cybersecurity models 终将出现，而且不只会出现在美国，因此对 frontier AI 设门槛可能既不能显著提升安全性，也会削弱美国的战略位置。他的判断是，如果先进模型无论如何都会变得可用，更好的选择是持续站在 frontier，并主导未来 AI 架构，而不是押注中国追不上。

items.en: Claude Code’s Boris Cherny sketched a future where product roles are less about job function and more about five working archetypes: Prototyper, Builder, Sweeper, Grower, and Maintainer. He argued that healthy teams need different mixes depending on product maturity, with pre-PMF products needing more invention and productionization, while mature products need cleanup, growth, and reliability.
items.zh: Claude Code 的 Boris Cherny 提出，未来的产品角色可能不再按传统职能划分，而更像五类工作原型：Prototyper、Builder、Sweeper、Grower 和 Maintainer。他认为，健康团队需要根据产品阶段配置不同组合，pre-PMF 产品更需要发明和落地能力，成熟产品则更需要清理、增长和可靠性。

items.en: OpenAI’s Thibault Sottiaux said the Codex team reset everyone’s usage limits while investigating reports of increased usage drain for some users. He framed it as a hard reset because some users had accumulated multiple banked resets, and said additional manual resets would come after the investigation for users affected shortly before the reset.
items.zh: OpenAI 的 Thibault Sottiaux 表示，Codex 团队正在调查部分用户 usage drain 增加的问题，并已重置所有人的使用额度。他称这是一次 hard reset，因为有些用户已经累积了多个 banked resets，并表示调查结束后，会给在重置前不久受到影响的用户补发更多 manual resets。

items.role: Practical AI tutorials and interviews for busy people
items.en: Peter Yang highlighted how Anthropic PMs use agents internally to get closer to the product, quoting Jess, product lead for Claude Managed Agents, on codebase access as the biggest unlock. The practical point is that PMs can track PRs, deployments, and product state directly instead of constantly querying engineers, making them more embedded in the build loop.
items.zh: Peter Yang 强调了 Anthropic PM 如何在内部使用 agents 更贴近产品，并引用 Claude Managed Agents 产品负责人 Jess 的说法，称访问 codebase 是最大的解锁点。这里的实际意义是，PM 可以直接跟踪 PR、部署和产品状态，而不是不断询问工程师，从而更深地进入构建循环。

items.en: Builder Zara Zhang argued that builders should spend twice as much time explaining, demonstrating, selling, and teaching a product as they spend building it. Her point is that distribution and user contact are not afterthoughts, they are part of refining the product against reality.
items.zh: Builder Zara Zhang 认为，做产品每花一小时构建，就应该花两小时解释、演示、销售和教学。她的重点是，distribution 和与用户接触不是事后补充，而是让产品在现实中被打磨的一部分。

items.en: Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch said builders do not need a LinkedIn as much as they need a page on their own website describing and linking to what they have shipped. The useful signal is a portfolio of concrete work, not a generic professional profile.
items.zh: Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch 表示，builders 与其需要 LinkedIn，不如在自己的网站上放一个页面，描述并链接自己真正 ship 过的东西。真正有信号价值的是具体作品集，而不是泛泛的职业资料页。

items.title: How we contain Claude across products
items.en: Anthropic Engineering: How we contain Claude across products lays out Anthropic’s hard-earned view that agent safety depends first on deterministic containment, then on model behavior controls. The post compares claude.ai’s ephemeral gVisor containers, Claude Code’s human-in-the-loop local sandbox, and Claude Cowork’s VM-based isolation, arguing that each product needs isolation matched to user expertise and blast radius. The most concrete lessons come from failures: Claude Code parsed untrusted project config before a trust prompt, an internal phish got Claude to exfiltrate credentials in 24 of 25 retries, and Cowork’s egress allowlist let data leave through api.anthropic.com using an attacker’s API key. Anthropic’s summary is blunt: “The deterministic boundary is what gets hit when everything probabilistic misses.”
items.zh: Anthropic Engineering: How we contain Claude across products 系统阐述了 Anthropic 的经验：agent safety 首先依赖确定性的隔离边界，其次才是模型行为控制。文章比较了 claude.ai 的临时 gVisor containers、Claude Code 的 human-in-the-loop 本地 sandbox，以及 Claude Cowork 的 VM 隔离，并指出每个产品都需要根据用户专业度和 blast radius 来选择隔离强度。最具体的教训来自失败案例：Claude Code 在 trust prompt 前解析了不可信项目配置，一次内部 phishing 测试让 Claude 在 25 次中 24 次外传 credentials，Cowork 的 egress allowlist 也让数据通过 api.anthropic.com 和攻击者 API key 流出。Anthropic 的总结很直接：“The deterministic boundary is what gets hit when everything probabilistic misses.”

items.source: The MAD Podcast with Matt Turck
items.title: The GPU Myth: State of AI Compute 2026 | Stephen Balaban
items.en: The Takeaway: Lambda cofounder and CTO Stephen Balaban thinks the AI compute market is still underbuilt because scaling laws keep expanding what models can do, and efficiency gains mostly turn into more token demand rather than lower compute demand. Balaban argues GPU cloud is not a commodity, because the real business spans land, power, data center construction, HPC networking, storage, orchestration software, financing, and utilization, with Lambda’s one-click clusters and vertical integration as examples of where neo clouds can differentiate. His sharpest line is that the skeptics were wrong about GPU depreciation: “The people who are the naysayers, you’re gonna throw these GPUs out in five years, are completely wrong.” He also pushed beyond infrastructure into software strategy, predicting that agentic software development works best where feedback is verifiable, while “neural software” and self-assembling software could eventually make AI become the software rather than merely write it.
items.zh: The Takeaway: Lambda cofounder and CTO Stephen Balaban 认为 AI compute 市场仍然处于 underbuilt 状态，因为 scaling laws 还在扩大模型能力，而效率提升通常会转化为更多 token 需求，而不是更少 compute 需求。Balaban 认为 GPU cloud 不是 commodity，因为真正的业务横跨 land、power、data center construction、HPC networking、storage、orchestration software、financing 和 utilization，Lambda 的 one-click clusters 与 vertical integration 就是 neo clouds 可以差异化的地方。他最尖锐的判断是，GPU 折旧怀疑论者错了：“The people who are the naysayers, you’re gonna throw these GPUs out in five years, are completely wrong.” 他还把话题从基础设施推进到软件战略，认为 agentic software development 最适合反馈可验证的场景，而 “neural software” 和 self-assembling software 最终可能让 AI 成为软件本身，而不只是写软件。

items.title: Recursive Self-Evolving Agents via Held-Out Selection
items.en: Introduces RSEA, a frozen-LLM agent that recursively rewrites its own natural-language strategy, skills, and playbook, but only keeps changes that pass held-out selection.
items.zh: 这篇论文提出 RSEA，一种 frozen-LLM agent，可以递归改写自己的自然语言 strategy、skills 和 playbook，但只有通过 held-out selection 的改动才会被保留。

items.title: Data and Evaluation Closed-Loop for Model Capability Enhancement
items.en: Proposes “capability slices” to connect benchmark failures back to data sources, domains, and quality labels so teams can make corpus fixes less by intuition and more by method.
items.zh: 这篇论文提出 “capability slices”，把 benchmark failures 与数据来源、领域和质量标签连接起来，让团队改语料时少靠直觉，多靠方法。

items.title: GPTNT: Benchmarking Real-Time Collaboration Between Multimodal Agents on Keep Talking And Nobody Explodes
items.en: Builds GPTNT, a benchmark based on Keep Talking and Nobody Explodes, to test multimodal agents under time pressure, information asymmetry, and imperfect communication.
items.zh: 这篇论文基于 Keep Talking and Nobody Explodes 构建 GPTNT benchmark，用来测试 multimodal agents 在时间压力、信息不对称和沟通不完美情况下的协作能力。

items.title: Developmental Trajectories of Situation Modeling and Mentalizing in Transformer Language Models
items.en: Tracks Olmo2 and Pythia training stages to study when false-belief and mental-state reasoning behaviors emerge, finding they depend on model size, training volume, and post-training.
items.zh: 这篇论文追踪 Olmo2 和 Pythia 的训练阶段，研究 false-belief 与 mental-state reasoning 行为何时出现，并发现它们依赖模型规模、训练量和 post-training。

items.title: Generating in the Limit with Infinitely Many Hallucinations
items.en: Recasts language generation in the limit as a recall-precision tradeoff, studying how broad coverage can conflict with valid generation and hallucination control.
items.zh: 这篇论文把极限中的语言生成重新表述为 recall-precision tradeoff，研究广覆盖如何与有效生成和 hallucination 控制发生冲突。

items.title: Spectral Perturbation of the Empirical Fisher Information Matrix under Weight Quantization
items.en: Studies how input shift and finite-precision weight quantization perturb the empirical Fisher Information Matrix, focusing on changes to its dominant eigenvalue.
items.zh: 这篇论文研究 input shift 和有限精度 weight quantization 如何扰动 empirical Fisher Information Matrix，重点关注其主导特征值的变化。

items.title: Role confusion: sounding like the cause is indistinguishable from being it.
items.en: LessWrong’s role-confusion post reports a partial replication of Prompt Injection as Role Confusion and then probes whether the proposed mechanism really holds up. The author reproduced the direction of the main result on a consumer GPU, but activation steering was too weak to move behavior and activation patching was not specific enough because random perturbations of similar size produced similar movement.
items.zh: LessWrong 的这篇 role-confusion 文章部分复现了 Prompt Injection as Role Confusion，并进一步检验其机制解释是否站得住。作者在消费级 GPU 上复现了主结果方向，但 activation steering 太弱，无法移动行为，而 activation patching 又不够特异，因为同等规模的随机扰动也产生了类似变化。

items.title: Malicious Perplexity Chrome Extension Intercepted Searches and Address Bar Input
items.en: The Hacker News reports that Microsoft found a malicious Chrome extension posing as Perplexity, the AI search engine. The extension logged searches and address bar input by routing queries and typed characters through an attacker-controlled server before redirecting users to real results, and Google removed it after responsible disclosure.
items.zh: The Hacker News 报道称，Microsoft 发现了一个伪装成 AI search engine Perplexity 的恶意 Chrome extension。该 extension 会记录搜索和地址栏输入，把 query 和用户输入的字符先路由到攻击者控制的服务器，再跳转到真实结果；Google 在 responsible disclosure 后已将其移除。

items.title: The Slogan Strikes Again
items.en: LessWrong’s The Slogan Strikes Again revisits the idea that “Compression is Intelligence” as a useful but imperfect intuition for why large models can appear intelligent over their training domain. The post frames LLM training as compressing the human text corpus into weights, while noting that literal memorization would be a different and less interesting endpoint.
items.zh: LessWrong 的 The Slogan Strikes Again 重新审视 “Compression is Intelligence” 这个说法，认为它是解释大模型为何在训练领域表现出智能的一种有用但不完美的直觉。文章把 LLM training 描述为把人类文本语料压缩进 weights，同时指出，纯粹记忆训练数据会是另一种没那么有意思的终点。

items.title: ARR review quality
items.en: A r/LanguageTechnology post says ARR review quality has dropped significantly across more than eight submissions and asks how the NLP community can reduce low-quality reviews and randomness in paper assignments. The author points to inexperienced reviewers, topic mismatches for experienced reviewers, and rubric problems as likely causes.
items.zh: 一篇 r/LanguageTechnology 帖子称，作者过去一年向 ARR 提交了 8 篇以上论文，明显感到 review 质量下降，并询问 NLP community 如何减少低质量 review 和 paper assignment 的随机性。作者认为可能原因包括 inexperienced reviewers、experienced reviewers 被分到不熟悉主题，以及 rubric 本身的问题。
